evidence: RoboTwin2 has oracle headroom, but anti-template pressure is not closed.
risks.name: expert_template_matching
risks.next_action: Prioritize non-template successes and low-DTW failed negatives before adding easier tasks.

evidence: RoboCasa365 passes, but the second executable benchmark is still pending.
risks.name: single_benchmark_overclaim
risks.next_action: Do not claim multi-benchmark effectiveness until RoboTwin2 passes the paper-readiness gate.

risks.name: weak_or_shortcut_baselines
risks.next_action: Carry the same controls plus DTW nearest-positive into RoboTwin2 and diagnostics.

evidence: Only RoboCasa365 currently passes; no real robot or second executable benchmark is closed.
risks.name: no_real_robot
risks.next_action: State the sim-only boundary explicitly; do not claim real-robot transfer without hardware evidence.

evidence: No passed diagnostic currently shows EFV beating a visual/model-score proxy.
risks.name: visual_plausibility_proxy
risks.next_action: Report visual/model-score proxy selectors next to EFV on MiraBench/RoboTrustBench/RoboWM-style diagnostics.

evidence: No world-model/trust diagnostic layer currently passes with oracle labels and proxy baseline controls.
risks.name: world_model_relevance
risks.next_action: Convert one 2025-2026 public diagnostic benchmark into a multi-candidate selector table.

risks.name: system_artifact_or_partial_run
risks.next_action: Require raw-integrity audits before manifest conversion and evidence-card validation before registry promotion.

risks.name: counterintuitive_signal_strength
risks.next_action: Keep the counterintuitive claim tied to rank0/oracle headroom and shortcut-controlled negatives.
